notes.files:register: POST /v1beta/files:register — Registers GCS files with FileService. Models (RegisterFilesRequest/RegisterFilesResponse) are implemented; resource method not yet added to the files resource.

Tool.note: codeExecution and urlContext remain Map<String,dynamic> (empty schemas in spec)

GenerateContentRequest.note: Excludes model (only used in endpoint URL path, not serialized in the body)

GroundingMetadata.note: Includes googleMapsWidgetContextToken field added in spec update

GroundingChunk.note: Upgraded from skip to object; fields match spec (web, retrievedContext, maps)

Part.note: Intentional skip: uses Dart sealed-class field-presence discrimination rather than spec's flat schema. The spec's Part schema represents a union of mutually exclusive fields, which is modeled in Dart as a sealed class hierarchy.

interactions:GoogleMaps.note: Skipped: interactions tool types use sealed_variant pattern via InteractionTool sealed class.

InteractionReviewSnippet.note: Named InteractionReviewSnippet to avoid collision with metadata ReviewSnippet (different JSON key casing).

UrlCitation.note: Handled by Annotation sealed class with type discriminator; appears in JSON as { "type": "<subtype>", ... }.

FileCitation.note: Handled by Annotation sealed class with type discriminator; appears in JSON as { "type": "<subtype>", ... }.

PlaceCitation.note: Handled by Annotation sealed class with type discriminator; appears in JSON as { "type": "<subtype>", ... }.

ThoughtSummaryContent.note: Represented as ThoughtContent.summary field rather than standalone type.

FunctionResultSubcontent.note: Flattened into FunctionResultContent rather than standalone type.

InteractionsInput.note: Mapped to InteractionInput; schema name differs from Dart class.

DownloadMediaResponse.note: Wire envelope around GdataMedia for GET /fileSearchStores/{id}/media/{mediaId}. Exposed in Dart as Future<List<int>> downloadMedia() in FileSearchStoresResource. Not modeled in python-genai or js-genai.

GdataMedia.note: Internal Google Scotty/Bigstore media descriptor; surfaces only inside DownloadMediaResponse. Exposed as raw bytes via FileSearchStoresResource.downloadMedia(). Not modeled in python-genai or js-genai.

Blobstore2Info.note: Internal Scotty/Bigstore type; reachable only through GdataMedia. See GdataMedia entry.

CompositeMedia.note: Internal Scotty/Bigstore type; reachable only through GdataMedia. See GdataMedia entry.

ContentTypeInfo.note: Internal Scotty/Bigstore type; reachable only through GdataMedia. See GdataMedia entry.

DiffChecksumsResponse.note: Internal Scotty/Bigstore type; reachable only through GdataMedia. See GdataMedia entry.

DiffVersionResponse.note: Internal Scotty/Bigstore type; reachable only through GdataMedia. See GdataMedia entry.

DownloadParameters.note: Internal Scotty/Bigstore type; reachable only through GdataMedia. See GdataMedia entry.

ObjectId.note: Internal Scotty/Bigstore type; reachable only through GdataMedia and CompositeMedia. See GdataMedia entry.
